code:
import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let n = string.len(line)
mut total = 0
mut cur = 0
mut sign = 1
mut in_num = false
mut i = 0

while i <= n
  let b = if i < n
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      32
    end
  else
    32
  end

  if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
    if in_num
      let val = cur * sign
      if val > 0
        total = total + val * 2
      end
      cur = 0
      sign = 1
      in_num = false
    end
  else if b == 45
    sign = -1
    in_num = true
  else if b == 43
    in_num = true
  else
    cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
    in_num = true
  end

  i = i + 1
end

println("result=#{total}")
